WHY WE BUILT THIS
Buildings waste energy because no one who uses the cooling pays for it.
03 / 11
75%+
Of UAE building energy is HVAC
In a country that runs the AC year-round
62.7%
Vacancy across our 10-room pilot

24/7
The cooling runs anyway

OUR ARCHITECTURE
Three layers. One platform.
04 / 11
1 · SENSE
Room Sensor Unit
5.8 GHz FMCW radar · presence + intent
±0.5°C temperature · ±3% humidity
Universal IR control · Zigbee 3.0 mesh
Local inference · <100ms decision latency
2 · CONNECT
Smart Gateway
Aggregates the entire RSU mesh
MQTT over TLS · 5G/4G LTE backhaul
BACnet bridge for centralized HVAC
Edge buffering · OTA updates
3 · OPTIMIZE
Pulse Platform + AI
PostgreSQL + Cassandra · live + historical
Graduated 4-mode setback · predictive control
IPMVP M&V reporting · weather-aware
Continuous learning · humidity safeguarded
GRADUATED SETBACK
Four modes. Comfort first, always.
05 / 11
OCCUPIED
22–24°C
Normal operation. Comfort target maintained.
Occupant detected
IDLE
+ 1°C
Short vacancy. Setpoint widens. Comfort returns instantly.
No presence for ~5 min
DEEP SETBACK
+ 1.5°C
Prolonged absence. Bigger savings without losing room readiness.
No presence for ~30 min
ECONOMY
OFF
Extended vacancy. Room effectively sealed.
No presence for ~2 hr+
Humidity safeguard overrides any setback above 65% RH. Comfort is never sacrificed for savings.

BUSINESS MODEL
One page. Nine blocks. End to end.
10 / 11
Key Partnerships
  • AUS — pilot host, first paying environment
  • Nokia (Catalocity) — telecom channel, DAC Marketplace
  • Sheraa Dojo+ — ecosystem access
  • Etihad ESCO (target) — 30,000-building pipeline
  • TDRA, Bureau Veritas, TiE Dubai
Key Activities
  • Hardware iteration (RSU + Gateway)
  • AI training on live pilot data
  • 24/7 pilot ops + M&V reporting
  • Direct BD to FMs & ESCOs
Key Resources
  • Custom RSU + Gateway (in-house)
  • Pulse Platform (Postgres + Cassandra)
  • AI optimization engine, IPMVP M&V
  • 3 co-founders, full-stack coverage
Value Propositions
  • 20–30% measured HVAC savings
  • Sub-2-year payback · zero CapEx
  • Days-not-months deployment
  • Works with any split / VRF brand via IR
  • Verified M&V for compliance reporting
  • Modular add-ons stack on installed sensors
Customer Relationships
  • Founder-led consultative selling
  • Free site survey + baseline
  • Pulse dashboard for ops teams
  • Monthly IPMVP M&V reports
  • Long-term technical partnership
Channels
  • Direct: facility managers, sustainability officers
  • ESCO partnerships (shared savings)
  • FM company portfolio deployments
  • Telecom: Nokia DAC Marketplace
  • Gov programs: ADES, Dubai DSM
Customer Segments
  • Universities & campuses
  • Hospitals & healthcare
  • Hotels & residential towers
  • Commercial properties & offices
  • Highest-value: buildings where occupants don’t pay electricity directly
Cost Structure
  • Hardware COGS (per room)
  • Cloud (Postgres + Cassandra + MQTT)
  • R&D (founder time today)
  • BD travel & events
  • Licensing during proof-of-concept phase
Revenue Streams
  • Hardware sales (~50% margin)
  • Setup & integration (one-time)
  • SaaS subscription, per room / month (~85% margin)
  • Add-on modules (~85% margin)
  • Performance-based with ESCOs (future)
